Class Schedule

Browse our weekly class schedule below. All classes are held at our main studio location.

Weekly Schedule

Time Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday
3:30 PM Kids Ballet Hip-Hop Kids Kids Ballet Jazz Kids Contemporary Kids Ballet
4:45 PM Teen Ballet Teen Ballet Teen Hip-Hop Teen Ballet Teen Jazz Teen Hip-Hop
6:00 PM Adult Ballet Salsa Beginner Adult Contemporary Adult Jazz Salsa Beginner Adult Ballet
7:15 PM Ballet Advanced Adult Hip-Hop Jazz Advanced Salsa Intermediate Contemporary Adv. Adult Classes

Pricing

  • Drop-in Class - $15 per class
  • 4-Class Pass - $50 (valid for 1 month)
  • 8-Class Pass - $90 (valid for 2 months)
  • Unlimited Monthly - $120 (unlimited classes)

How to Register

  1. Choose a class from the schedule above
  2. Visit our Contact page to register
  3. Arrive 10 minutes early to your first class
  4. Have fun!

First-Time Students

First-time students receive a free trial class! Just let us know you’re new when you arrive.

Questions about our schedule? Contact us anytime!
